suite.name: 01 Explorer

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://localhost:51734, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:51734/v1/auth/signup path_url=/v1/auth/signup headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '113', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "e2e-audit-1776362953@tennetctl.test", "password": "pass-audit-E2E-1234!", "display_name": "Audit E2E"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://localhost:51734, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:51734/v1/auth/me path_url=/v1/auth/me headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'tennetctl_session=019d977b-99f8-7f90-8f1e-f1372048e93a.A-SqHh6QaaSHvKsCkzwZzz7ymowf3MkNz9qyZTRj_F4'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Seed Audit Events Into Org
Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : psycopg2.connect(database='tennetctl', user='tennetctl', password=***, host='localhost', port=5434)
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.msg: ${sql} = INSERT INTO "04_audit"."60_evt_audit" (id, event_key, actor_user_id, actor_session_id, org_id, workspace_id, trace_id, span_id, audit_category, outcome, metadata) SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, CASE ...
kw.arg: (id, event_key, actor_user_id, actor_session_id, org_id, workspace_id, trace_id, span_id, audit_category, outcome, metadata)
CASE i % 3 WHEN 0 THEN '${prefix}.evt.alpha' WHEN 1 THEN '${prefix}.evt.beta' ELSE '${prefix}.evt.gamma' END,
'setup', CASE i % 4 WHEN 3 THEN 'failure' ELSE 'success' END,
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
INSERT INTO "04_audit"."60_evt_audit" (id, event_key, actor_user_id, actor_session_id, org_id, workspace_id, trace_id, span_id, audit_category, outcome, metadata) SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, CASE i % 3 WHEN 0 THEN 'e2e-audit-1776362953.evt.alpha' WHEN 1 THEN 'e2e-audit-1776362953.evt.beta' ELSE 'e2e-audit-1776362953.evt.gamma' END, '019d977b-997d-7a82-939d-2333e4cd9d76', '019d977b-99f8-7f90-8f1e-f1372048e93a', '019d9660-8b03-7370-b4ac-c54b2b1d9986', COALESCE('019d9660-8b03-7370-b4ac-c54b2b1d9986'::text, '019d9660-8b03-7370-b4ac-c54b2b1d9986'), gen_random_uuid()::text, gen_random_uuid()::text, 'setup', CASE i % 4 WHEN 3 THEN 'failure' ELSE 'success' END, jsonb_build_object('i', i, 'tag', 'e2e-audit-1776362953') FROM generate_series(0, 11) i;
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.
Insert 12 demo audit events for the given user/org via raw SQL. Uses category='setup' to bypass scope CHECK when workspace_id missing. Generates 36-char UUID v7 ids via gen_random_uuid().

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/sri/Documents/tennetctl/tests/e2e/results/browser/traces/temp/26dda970-362e-408f-afc2-1a5ad627ebbd"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: about:blank
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

test.name: Audit Explorer Renders Rows And Stats

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="signin-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'e2e-audit-1776362953@tennetctl.test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'pass-audit-E2E-1234!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 20000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="audit-filter-bar"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="audit-stats-panel"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'e2e-audit-1776362953.evt*' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Expected at least one audit row; got ${count}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="audit-stats-total"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

test.doc: Sign in, navigate /audit, apply prefix filter, verify filter bar, stats panel, and events table all show seeded events (12 total).

test.name: Filter By Event Key Glob Reduces Set

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'e2e-audit-1776362953.evt.alpha' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="audit-stats-total"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

test.doc: Narrow the glob to .alpha only — 4 rows (12 / 3 event types).

test.name: Detail Drawer Opens On Row Click

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Expected at least one audit row
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="audit-detail-drawer"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="detail-metadata"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="audit-detail-drawer"] at state hidden
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

test.doc: Click the first event row, verify the drawer opens with the metadata block rendered, then close it.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : psycopg2.connect(database='tennetctl', user='tennetctl', password=***, host='localhost', port=5434)
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
DELETE FROM "04_audit"."60_evt_audit" WHERE event_key LIKE 'e2e-audit-1776362953.%' OR metadata->>'tag' = 'e2e-audit-1776362953';
kw.arg: DELETE FROM "04_audit"."60_evt_audit" WHERE event_key LIKE '${prefix}.%' OR metadata->>'tag' = '${prefix}';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Audit Explorer — navigation, filtering, detail drawer, stats. Drives live backend (51734) + frontend (51735). Creates a test user via API, seeds audit events for that user's org, signs in via UI, navigates /audit, verifies filter + detail drawer.
